description_long: This nightstand is a compact, rectangular piece of furniture crafted primarily from wood, featuring a natural brown finish. The front side displays an open shelf beneath a flat tabletop, providing accessible storage space for small items. The sides are solid panels, and the back is fully enclosed, giving the structure a sturdy and boxy appearance. The legs are short and straight, integrated into the side panels, elevating the nightstand slightly off the ground. There are no visible handles or decorative elements, emphasizing a minimalist and functional design. The overall look is utilitarian, making it suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A small, boxy wooden nightstand with an open shelf and minimalist design, finished in natural brown. It features solid sides and short, integrated legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open shelf and flat tabletop, with the main storage area visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the solid panel construction and the short, straight legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fully enclosed back and the overall boxy shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the solid side panel and leg structure.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
